Name: crm_greeting
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Salesforce CRM Agent
_Description: Trigger when user sends a greeting or opening message — hi hello hey good morning good afternoon or starts conversation with no clear action request

Name: account_at_risk
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Salesforce CRM Agent
_Description: Trigger when user mentions an account is at risk unhappy likely to churn or in danger of cancelling — at risk might churn losing this account they're unhappy customer might leave account in trouble

Name: user_frustrated_urgent
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Salesforce CRM Agent
_Description: Trigger when user expresses frustration urgency or distress about a customer issue — this is urgent customer is furious nothing is working I need help immediately critical issue major problem

Name: crm_out_of_scope
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Salesforce CRM Agent
_Description: Trigger when user asks for something this agent cannot do — deleting records running reports modifying dashboards changing Salesforce settings bulk imports or completely unrelated topics

Name: deal_closed_won
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when an opportunity has been moved to Closed Won or user celebrates a deal win — deal is closed won we closed it just won the deal great news we got the deal

Name: deal_closed_lost
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when an opportunity has been moved to Closed Lost or user reports losing a deal — deal closed lost we lost it not going to win competitor won lost the deal unfortunately lost

Name: deal_stalled
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when user says a deal is not moving no progress stuck in the same stage for a while — deal stalled not progressing hasn't moved no progress same stage for weeks stuck deal going nowhere

Name: stages_clarification
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when user asks what stages are available or what stage to pick — what stages are there what stage should I use what are my options for stage list the stages

Name: close_date_overdue
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when user mentions a close date is in the past overdue or missed — close date passed date is in the past overdue missed the close date should have closed already

Name: opportunity_not_found
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Opportunity Stage CloseDate
_Description: Trigger when user says they cannot find an opportunity or the agent returns no results — can't find it doesn't exist not showing up opportunity not found can't locate the deal no match found

Name: cpq_greeting
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when user sends a first greeting or opening message to the CPQ agent — hi hello hey good morning or starts with no clear quote or product action request

Name: cpq_out_of_scope
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when user asks CPQ agent for something outside its scope — case management account updates contacts reports dashboards anything not related to quotes pricebooks opportunities or quote lines

Name: quote_expired_or_expiring
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when user mentions a quote is expired or about to expire — quote expired expiration date passed needs to be renewed quote is no longer valid the quote ran out

Name: discount_requested
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when customer or rep requests a discount on a quote or quote line — need a discount can we reduce the price price too high discount request wants percent off lower the price

Name: quote_approval_needed
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when a quote needs manager or executive approval before sending or finalising — needs approval waiting for approval manager needs to approve quote approval required get this approved

Name: bundle_product_help
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when user is confused about bundle products option lines or child quote lines — what is a bundle how do I add options bundle line required by parent product bundle confused about bundles

Name: cpq_delete_warning
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: CPQ Agent
_Description: Trigger when user wants to delete a quote or quote line — delete this quote remove quote delete line item remove product from quote want to delete wipe the quote

Name: doc_greeting
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent
_Description: Trigger when user sends a first greeting or opening message — hi hello hey good morning or starts with no specific document search request

Name: upload_or_edit_request
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent
_Description: Trigger when user wants to upload edit create modify or delete a document — upload a file add a document edit this file change the document delete it modify the attachment

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent

Name: document_not_found
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent
_Description: Trigger when document search returns no results or user confirms the file is missing — no results found document missing can't locate the file not in the system doesn't exist

Name: sensitive_document_concern
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent
_Description: Trigger when user mentions a document is sensitive confidential restricted or private — confidential document sensitive file restricted access private document NDA not for everyone

Name: no_document_name_given
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Document Intelligence Agent

Name: pipeline_forecast_overview
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability
_Description: Trigger when user asks what probability means or how it is used — what does probability mean how is probability calculated what is 70 percent probability explain probability scoring

Name: must_win_deal_flag
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability

Name: pipeline_gap_identified
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability
_Description: Trigger when search results show no high-probability opportunities or user identifies a pipeline gap — no deals found no high probability opportunities pipeline looks empty gap in pipeline low pipeline

Name: quarter_close_urgency
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Find Opportunity by Probability
_Description: Trigger when user is focused on end of quarter urgency to close deals — end of quarter need to close by quarter end Q close push for close month end crunch time closing deals

Name: case_resolved_ready_to_close
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user says case is resolved fixed sorted and ready to close — resolved fixed solved done can close it ready to close this issue has been sorted all good now

Name: case_on_hold_waiting
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user wants to put a case on hold or is waiting for customer response — on hold waiting for customer pending customer response waiting on information need to pause case

Name: no_case_id_provided
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user wants to update a case but does not provide the case ID or case number — close this case update the case status without giving a case ID or case number

Name: case_status_options
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user asks what case statuses are available or what status to set — what statuses are available what can I set the status to status options for cases

Name: case_urgent_critical
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user signals a case is urgent or critical and needs immediate attention — urgent case critical priority highest priority need this sorted immediately escalate now

Name: customer_at_risk_of_churning
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when conversation suggests customer might cancel or is very unhappy due to unresolved issues — customer is fed up threatening to cancel at risk of leaving not happy with support

Name: case_sla_breach
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Update Case Status
_Description: Trigger when user mentions a case has breached or is approaching SLA limits — SLA breach SLA deadline SLA violation due today past SLA response time exceeded

Name: ipd_greeting
ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent

ccai_qa__AI_Agent__r:Name: Insurance Plan Discovery Agent
